temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A man with a distressed and intense expression peers through a broken, wavy-patterned glass pane. His eyes are wide with fear or concern as he looks at something off-screen. The lighting is dim and moody, casting a greenish hue on the scene. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a tense and mysterious atmosphere, introducing a character in a state of distress or urgency.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A sharp, startling sound effect like a glass shattering, followed by a low, ominous musical score.)
(00:02-00:05) A man in a dark suit and tie looks down with a deeply troubled and somber expression. A single, prominent bead of sweat is visible on his forehead, and his brow is furrowed, indicating extreme stress or anxiety. (Storyline: This shot introduces another character who is clearly under immense pressure or in a difficult situation, adding to the overall sense of suspense.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous, dramatic musical score continues, building tension.)
